name: Git Branching Strategy
description: Clear request for git workflow design, focused on team branching strategy
task: Help me design a git branching strategy for a team of 5 developers. We use feature branches and need a process for code review and merging.

coding_challenge.description: Create a Git workflow class that manages branch operations. Implement methods for creating feature branches, merging with main, and detecting conflicts. Should provide a simple interface for team workflows.
